title: Grand Pavilion 大观楼 — Authentic Cantonese Restaurant Flushing NY
description: Authentic Cantonese cuisine with 80+ dim sum varieties daily. Fine dining, private banquets up to 500 guests, and seasonal festival menus. Reserve your table at Grand Pavilion 大观楼, Flushing NY.

/.title: Grand Pavilion 大观楼 — Authentic Cantonese Restaurant Flushing NY
/.description: Authentic Cantonese cuisine with 80+ dim sum varieties daily. Reserve your table at Flushing's premier Chinese dining destination.

/menu.title: Menu — Grand Pavilion 大观楼
/menu.description: Explore our full menu: dim sum served daily until 3pm, Cantonese dinner classics, chef's signature dishes, and weekend brunch.

/menu/dim-sum.title: Dim Sum Menu 点心菜单 — Grand Pavilion 大观楼
/menu/dim-sum.description: Over 80 hand-crafted dim sum varieties daily from 10am to 3pm. Steamed, baked, fried, and dessert selections with full Chinese menu names.

/menu/dinner.title: Dinner Menu 晚餐 — Grand Pavilion 大观楼
/menu/dinner.description: Classic Cantonese dinner menu featuring fresh seafood, roasted meats, and traditional family-style dishes. Served nightly from 5pm.

/menu/chef-signatures.title: Chef's Signatures — Grand Pavilion 大观楼
/menu/chef-signatures.description: Chef Li Wei's signature creations — including Peking Duck, Live Lobster, and Braised Abalone. The pinnacle of Cantonese mastery.

/reservations.title: Reserve a Table — Grand Pavilion 大观楼
/reservations.description: Book your table at Grand Pavilion. Online reservations available for dinner service and weekend brunch. Private dining for groups of 10 to 500.

/private-dining.title: Private Dining & Banquets — Grand Pavilion 大观楼
/private-dining.description: Private dining rooms and grand ballroom for up to 500 guests. Wedding banquets, corporate events, birthday celebrations, and family gatherings.

/about.title: About — Grand Pavilion 大观楼
/about.description: The story of Grand Pavilion and Executive Chef Li Wei — 25+ years of Cantonese mastery in the heart of Flushing.

/contact.title: Contact & Hours — Grand Pavilion 大观楼
/contact.description: Visit us at 133-24 Roosevelt Ave, Flushing NY. Open daily. Call (718) 555-0188 or reserve online.

/gallery.title: Gallery — Grand Pavilion 大观楼
/gallery.description: Photography of our signature dishes, dim sum, dining room, and event spaces.

/catering.title: Catering — Grand Pavilion 大观楼
/catering.description: Off-site catering for corporate events, weddings, and private parties. Authentic Cantonese cuisine delivered.

/festivals/chinese-new-year.title: Chinese New Year Dinner 农历新年 — Grand Pavilion 大观楼
/festivals/chinese-new-year.description: Celebrate Lunar New Year 2027 with our special prix-fixe banquet dinner. Limited tables available — reserve early.

/festivals/mid-autumn.title: Mid-Autumn Festival 中秋节 — Grand Pavilion 大观楼
/festivals/mid-autumn.description: Celebrate Mid-Autumn Festival with our special seasonal menu and mooncake gift boxes. Reserve your table.
